title: More Menu (Part 2/2)
heading: Announcements
text:
Public Prosecutor (3 posts) in the Court of Ld. Sessions Judge and Ld. Addl. Session Judge, under West Tripura District. | Applications in plain paper are invited from the suitable candidate for the post of Public Prosecutor (1 post) and Addl. Public Prosecutor (3 posts) in the Court of Ld. Sessions Judge and Ld. Addl. Session Judge, under West Tripura District. | 27/11/2024 | 06/12/2024 | |
| Sending of notification issued by the Revenue Department dated, 01/May/2024 regarding formation of Social Impact Assessment Study Team for the purpose of conversion of existing road from Lichubagan to Airport New Terminal Point into 4(four) lane of mouja Barjala, Sheet No.3/p under Sadar Sub-Divisionfor wide display. | | 03/05/2024 | 03/06/2024 | |
| Member Details of the Internal Complaint Committees and Local Complaint Committee | | 13/02/2024 | 31/05/2024 | |
